title: Toyrific 99 cm Unicorn Hobby Horse, Unicorn Plush Toy with Sounds Strong Handles and Wheels
features: MAGICAL UNICORN ADVENTURE: the perfect first unicorn for all young dreamers and fantasy lovers. Let their imagination come to life with their own unicorn!

STURDY & SAFE: built to last, this toy is made with durable materials and smooth wooden wheels, making it easy for kids to prance and glide around. The unicorn's head is soft material, to keep kids safe whilst playing
INTERACTIVE FEATURES: Press the ear to hear fun neigh and gallop sounds, rainbow reins also add to the excitement. Follow label instructions to activate sounds.
SKILL BUILDING: this toy is perfect for kids to use their imagination through role-play! It will help get children active and think creatively about their next playtime
PERFECT GIFT: helps to develop your child’s mobility, balance and creativity! Ideal for kids who enjoy role-play-based experiences. Ages 2+
